title: OpenWhispr shared settings
description: Settings shared between desktop and mobile. Desktop persists them in localStorage under the same key names (see CLAUDE.md §5); mobile persists them as a JSON document.

whisperModel.description: Whisper model name from modelRegistryData.json whisperModels

useCleanupModel.description: Cleanup on/off. Off = raw transcript mode

saveHistory.description: Persist transcriptions to the local history table

customDictionary.description: Hint words; entries formatted "misheard => correct" are also post-transcription corrections

transcriptionServerUrl.description: Mobile only: URL of the LAN transcription bridge (scripts/mobile-whisper-server.js on the desktop), e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8380
